Label: Section 3.1
Issue: does not specify the types of web-ready devices supported
Correction: The system shall support web-ready devices including but not limited to computers, smartphones, and tablets.

Label: Section 3.2.1
Issue: does not specify the process for adding or removing users
Correction: The system shall provide an interface for the Master User to add or remove users.

Label: Section 3.3
Issue: does not specify the development process to be used
Correction: The development team shall use the Agile development process for the project.

Label: Section 4.1
Issue: does not specify the types of small appliances that can be controlled
Correction: The system shall support control of small appliances such as coffee makers, lamps, and fans.

Label: Section 4.2
Issue: does not specify the response time for thermostat adjustments
Correction: The system shall adjust the thermostat settings within 5 seconds of user input.

Label: Section 4.3
Issue: does not specify the response time for humidistat adjustments
Correction: The system shall adjust the humidistat settings within 5 seconds of user input.

Label: Section 4.4
Issue: does not specify the types of alarms supported
Correction: The system shall support both audible and visual alarms.

Label: Section 4.5
Issue: does not specify the types of small appliances that can be managed
Correction: The system shall support management of small appliances such as coffee makers, lamps, and fans.

Label: Section 4.6
Issue: does not specify the format of the monthly planner
Correction: The monthly planner shall be presented in a calendar format with daily time slots for setting parameters.

Label: Section 5.1
Issue: does not specify total supported number of concurrent users
Correction: The system shall handle up to 10,000 concurrent users without performance degradation.

Label: Section 5.2
Issue: does not specify the recovery time after a failure
Correction: The system shall recover and restore data within 5 minutes of a failure.

Label: Section 5.3
Issue: does not specify safety measures for power switches
Correction: The system shall include safety measures to prevent accidental activation of power switches.

Label: Section 5.4
Issue: does not specify the encryption method for data transmission
Correction: The system shall use AES-256 encryption for all data transmissions.

Label: Section 5.5
Issue: does not specify the frequency of maintenance updates
Correction: The system shall receive maintenance updates at least once every quarter.

Label: Section 5.6
Issue: does not specify the process for updating business rules
Correction: The system shall provide an interface for administrators to update business rules as needed.

Label: Section 5.7
Issue: does not specify the format of the user documentation
Correction: The user documentation shall be provided in both PDF and HTML formats.

Label: N/A
Issue: does not include a section for system scalability requirements
Correction: The system shall be scalable to support future expansion of up to 200% of the initial capacity.

Label: N/A
Issue: does not include a section for user training requirements
Correction: The system shall include a comprehensive user training program with video tutorials and user manuals.

Label: N/A
Issue: does not include a section for data privacy requirements
Correction: The system shall comply with GDPR and other relevant data privacy regulations.

Label: N/A
Issue: does not include a section for system integration requirements
Correction: The system shall integrate with existing home automation systems and third-party services.
